attacking_style: Participates in long-range breakaways exceeding 187km, willing to commit to extended efforts in tailwind conditions though execution suggests pacing challenges.
team_tactics: Deployed as domestique in breakaway duties, accepting high-risk, long-distance efforts to animate race and potentially deplete peloton resources.
terrain_preference: Tailwind stages where sustained tempo over extreme distances is required; flat to rolling terrain enabling multi-hour breakaway attempts.
vulnerability: Late-race cramp in extended efforts suggests fueling protocol weaknesses or inability to pace properly over 180km+ breakaway distances.
key_patterns: Single observed cramping incident in 187km breakaway suggests potential nutrition or pacing issues.
Willing to commit to ultra-long breakaway efforts as domestique role.
Physical limitations exposed in final stages of extended tailwind breakaways.
form_trajectory: unknown: Single cramping observation insufficient to determine trend; incident suggests execution issues rather than fitness decline
